hero.description: International school in Uralsk for students in grades 0–11. IB PYP program, strong academics, and personalized approach

ibStatus.title: IB PYP Candidate School
ibStatus.description: Scandic International School is currently a candidate school* for the International Baccalaureate (IB) Primary Years Programme. This school is pursuing authorization as an IB World School. IB World Schools share a common philosophy—a commitment to high-quality, challenging, international education—that we believe is important for our students.

mission.title: SIS Mission
mission.description: We nurture harmonious personalities, committed to the idea of building a better world based on moral values.

ibStatus.title: IB PYP Candidate School
ibStatus.description: Scandic International School is currently a candidate school* for the International Baccalaureate (IB) Primary Years Programme. This school is pursuing authorization as an IB World School. IB World Schools share a common philosophy—a commitment to high-quality, challenging, international education—that we believe is important for our students.
ibStatus.disclaimer: *Only schools authorized by the IB Organization can offer any of its four academic programmes: the Primary Years Programme (PYP), the Middle Years Programme (MYP), the Diploma Programme, or the Career-related Programme (CP). Candidate status gives no guarantee that authorization will be granted.

about.title: WELCOME TO SIS
about.subtitle: Learn more about our school and our approach to education
about.quote1Text: Scandic International School provides high-quality international education, combining academic rigour with the creative development of every student.
about.quote2Text: The school creates an atmosphere where students develop curiosity, creativity, and confidence, preparing them for life in a global world.

aims.title: Our Aims
aims.description: We strive to nurture well-rounded individuals committed to building a better world. Our educational programme is built on the principles of respect, excellence, knowledge, and international collaboration.

history.title: Our History
history.description: Scandic International School was founded to bring world-class education to children in Uralsk. Inspired by the Danish educational system, we have created a unique environment for every child's development.

facilities.title: Facilities
facilities.description: Modern classrooms, laboratories, sports grounds, and creative spaces — everything for the comprehensive development of students in a safe and comfortable environment.

metadata.title: About Us | Scandic International School
metadata.description: Learn more about Scandic International School - our mission, values and approach to education

order.error: An error occurred while placing the order. Please try again.

founder.label: From the Founder
founder.title: A Message from Our CEO & Founder
founder.name: Amir Bekmukhanov
founder.company: Owner of Danish technology company «BYTEALL ENERGY»
founder.quote1: At Scandic International School, we create an environment where academic rigor meets creative freedom. Our vision is not just to impart knowledge, but to ignite the spark of curiosity in every child. Our graduates will be prepared to study at the world's best universities.
founder.quote2: Living in Denmark, I realized that the same quality of education can be established in Kazakhstan, in my hometown of Uralsk.

partners.title: PARTNERSHIPS
partners.intro: At Scandic International School, we believe that strong partnerships with leading educational institutions and technology companies enrich the educational experience of our students. We strive to create connections that open new horizons for development, knowledge exchange, and collaborative projects.
partners.subtitle: We are proud to collaborate with leading educational institutions and companies that share our commitment to quality education
partners.ctaSubtitle: If you are interested in collaborating with Scandic International School, we would love to discuss partnership opportunities

community.title: TEACHERS — CHILDREN — PARENTS
community.subtitle: Raising a child is a three-way process
community.philosophy: We build trusting relationships between teachers, children, and parents, hear everyone's voice, and strengthen the bond between school and family, understanding that raising a child is a three-way process.

teachers.title: Teachers
teachers.description: Mentorship, professionalism, individual approach to every student

children.title: Children
children.description: At the center of education, developing potential and independence

parents.title: Parents
parents.description: Partners in learning, active involvement, and constant feedback

academicPrograms.title: ACADEMIC PROGRAM
academicPrograms.subtitle: Interdisciplinary approach: focus on STEM and personal development

science.title: Natural Sciences
science.description: Physics, chemistry, and biology through research, experiments, and hands-on practice. Science not from a textbook, but through real experiments and projects. Taught in English, allowing students to master the subject while developing language skills naturally.

math.title: Mathematics
math.description: Calculus, arithmetic, algebra, geometry — exceptional development of logic and advanced analytical skills.

arts.title: Arts & History
arts.description: Visual arts, music, and drama as tools for self-expression. History as the foundation for understanding the modern world.

languages.title: Language Program
languages.description: Trilingual environment — Kazakh, Russian, English. Language learning through context and practice in everyday academic activities.

academicPrograms.structureTeaserText: Learn how our school is organized — from governance to infrastructure
academicPrograms.stemDescription: Our subjects don't exist in isolation — they are connected through projects, research, and practical application of knowledge. The STEM focus allows students to see connections between science, technology, engineering, and mathematics.
